name: serverless-temp-file-sharing
description: Serverless Temporary File Sharing using Cloudflare Worker and Google Drive API

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Google OAuth 2.0 Client ID (e.g. 1234567890.apps.googleusercontent.com). Create one at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Google OAuth 2.0 Client Secret. Found in the OAuth 2.0 credentials page.

GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN.description: Google OAuth 2.0 Refresh Token. Obtain via OAuth 2.0 Playground: https://developers.google.com/oauthplayground

DESTINATION_FOLDER_ID.description: Google Drive Folder ID where uploaded files will be stored. Found at the end of the folder URL: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/<FOLDER_ID>

PAGE_TITLE.description: (Optional) Custom page title. Default: Temporary File Sharing

PAGE_LOGO.description: (Optional) Custom logo URL for the page header and favicon.

META_TITLE.description: (Optional) Custom meta title for SEO and social sharing.

META_DESCRIPTION.description: (Optional) Custom meta description for SEO and social sharing.

META_KEYWORD.description: (Optional) Comma-separated keywords for SEO. Example: awesome, myapp, best-app-ever

META_URL.description: (Optional) Your custom domain URL. Example: your.domain.com
